name: generation-time trace fields include source_pr_number per consulted pattern reference
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"event":"generation","consulted_prs":[{"number":42,"org":"a"}]}\n' > event.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event event.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"source_pr_number":42' pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
